var_call_jypzZk0r94GArBeh8XGot4t4.title: Wall St. Bears Claw Back Into the Black (Reuters)
var_call_jypzZk0r94GArBeh8XGot4t4.description: Reuters - Short-sellers, Wall Street's dwindling\band of ultra-cynics, are seeing green again.

var_call_jypzZk0r94GArBeh8XGot4t4.title: Carlyle Looks Toward Commercial Aerospace (Reuters)
var_call_jypzZk0r94GArBeh8XGot4t4.description: Reuters - Private investment firm Carlyle Group,\which has a reputation for making well-timed and occasionally\controversial plays in the defense industry, has quietly placed\its bets on another part of the market.

var_call_jypzZk0r94GArBeh8XGot4t4.title: Oil and Economy Cloud Stocks' Outlook (Reuters)
var_call_jypzZk0r94GArBeh8XGot4t4.description: Reuters - Soaring crude prices plus worries\about the economy and the outlook for earnings are expected to\hang over the stock market next week during the depth of the\summer doldrums.

var_call_jypzZk0r94GArBeh8XGot4t4.title: Iraq Halts Oil Exports from Main Southern Pipeline (Reuters)
var_call_jypzZk0r94GArBeh8XGot4t4.description: Reuters - Authorities have halted oil export\flows from the main pipeline in southern Iraq after\intelligence showed a rebel militia could strike\infrastructure, an oil official said on Saturday.

var_call_jypzZk0r94GArBeh8XGot4t4.title: Oil prices soar to all-time record, posing new menace to US economy (AFP)
var_call_jypzZk0r94GArBeh8XGot4t4.description: AFP - Tearaway world oil prices, toppling records and straining wallets, present a new economic menace barely three months before the US presidential elections.
